concerns.sentence: Acute alcoholic hepatitis, alcoholic cirrhosis, and hepatic encephalopathy [E:cond:1][E:cond:18][E:cond:3].
concerns.reason: Alcoholic cirrhosis is not listed in the provided fact sheet.

concerns.sentence: Other issues include ascites, UTI, coagulation defects, protein-calorie malnutrition, anorexia nervosa, alcohol dependence, and lupus erythematosus [E:cond:9][E:cond:10][E:cond:8][E:cond:6][E:cond:15][E:cond:17][E:cond:28].
concerns.reason: Alcohol dependence and lupus erythematosus are not listed in the provided fact sheet.
